result.summary: Airport Pickups London exposes a partner REST booking API, an A2A agent endpoint, and a catalog-listed MCP server endpoint; the HTTP surfaces use an `x-api-key`, while the MCP endpoint is included per catalog as unauthenticated.
result.description: Airport Pickups London provides pre-booked private airport, cruise port, and UK ground transfer services. Its service covers quotes, bookings, amendments, cancellations, and driver tracking for journeys between UK airports, cruise ports, and addresses.

apl_api_key.label: APL API key
apl_api_key.setup: For the easiest path, self-register from the API docs’ [Agent Registration](https://mcp.airport-pickups-london.com/docs#registration) section to get an API key. Existing partners can also request their assigned key as described in the [Authentication](https://mcp.airport-pickups-london.com/docs#authentication) section by contacting APL support. Send the key in the `x-api-key` header.

apl_oauth_client.label: APL OAuth client/app for MCP
apl_oauth_client.setup: Register an OAuth client against APL’s OAuth server using the [registration endpoint metadata](https://mcp.airport-pickups-london.com/.well-known/oauth-authorization-server), which advertises `registration_endpoint` at `https://mcp.airport-pickups-london.com/register`. MCP clients can then use the discovered OAuth 2.1 authorization server metadata to complete authorization and obtain bearer tokens for the MCP server.

surfaces.name: Airport Pickups London A2A agent endpoint
